"[8] [Appended, 19:09:26] [2] PER RP HE THINKS HE AGREES IT IS THE ONE ON DAILY RD"
"[7] [Appended, 19:09:26] [1] RP REPORTING FIRE SOUTH EAST OF HIS LOCATION ON A RIDGE"
"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-CDF SD - ALSO HAD VEG FIRE AT DE LUZ/ DAILY RD"
"[4] CDF SD - PATIENT OO VEH AND IN SAFE AREA PER INV "
"[3] CDF SD - TC THAT TURNED INTO CFIRE THEN SPREAD TO VEG FIRE "
"[52] B59-020 THERE IS A VEH FACING WW JSO ROSAMOND BLVD ON THE NB SIDE [Shared]"
"[42] ADDL TO LINE 38 VEH HAD FLASHER ON AND ON RHS [Shared]"
"[41] B59-020 VEH IS NOT ONE AND THE SAME [Shared]"
"[38] B59-020 GOING OUT WITH A VEH OF SB JSO 14 [Shared]"
"[11] RP ADVS TRIED STOPPING VEH VEH DROVE RHS AND DROVE UP THE OFF RAMP "
"[8] ADVS NEAR MISS TC WITH RP "
"[24] [Appended, 21:14:51] [7] [Appended, 21:12:40] [1] VEH IS SB IN NB LANES "
"[4] RP ADVS VEH GOT ON THE OFF RAMP TO GO ON THE FREEWAY "
"[1] SIL 4D DRIVNG ON THE WRONG SIDE OF THE LANE HEADED TOWARDS LANCASTER "

Log.Location: "I10 E / Haugen Lehmann Wy, Exit 110 Mm 24.5"
Log.LocationDesc: "I10 E Haugen Lehmann Wy, Exit 110 MM 24.5"

details.IncidentDetail: "[15] 131-E16 ON THE OFR - VEH VS TREE [Shared]"
"[10] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1183-Trfc Collision-Unkn Inj to 1182-Trfc Collision-No Inj by CHP [Shared]"
"[5] [Appended, 19:43:19] [1] RED TK AND 4 ADDL VEHS - ALL MOVED TO RS"
"[2] ^TMC MEDIA LINE IS CLOSED-FOR FURTHER INFORMATION PLEASE CONTACT CHP DISPATCH AT (949) 784-6700"
